subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Tahir! Hearken unto the Call raised from the precincts of My Most Great Prison. Verily, there is none other God but He, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل طاهر ان استمع الندآء من شطر سجنی الاعظم انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
